headline: Has Tractor Supply (TSCO) Fallen Far Enough To Look Fairly Valued?
summary: Tractor Supply stock has fallen sharply over the past year, yet the valuation signals are not one sided. The Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate points to a premium relative to the current share price, while market based multiples look closer to fair. Over the last 12 months, Tractor Supply shares are down 45.3%, a drop that naturally raises the question of whether the market has turned too pessimistic on the business. Recent analyst downgrades and softer operating trends...
